title: Disney Store Official Princess Figure Set, 7 Toys including Mulan, Pocahontas, Merida, Jasmine, Snow White, Aurora & Cinderella, Suitable for Age 3+
features: Play happily ever after with this seven piece Disney Princess figure set, ready to recreate any Princess adventure or story. Expressive sculpts and ornate costumes adorn our fairytale heroines as all their dreams come true
The set includes toy figures of Mulan, Pocahontas, Merida (Brave), Jasmine (Aladdin), Snow White (Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs), Aurora (Sleeping Beauty) & Cinderella
Measuring between 8-10cm tall, each toy figure is fully sculpted, intricately detailed and brightly coloured, complete with attached bases.

Housed in a stunning box with Princess inspired artwork, this miniature figure set would make an ideal gift for any Disney Princess fan, for birthdays, Christmas, everyday play or even to display as part of a Disney collection!
Coming from the Disney Store, you can be confident that this product has been made with the utmost care, quality and a sprinkle if Disney magic!
description: Play happily ever after with seven Disney Princess figures in this set that's ready to fill every castle and cottage with fun and fantasy. Aurora, Cinderella, Jasmine, and Merida are among those presented in a double-tiered window display box with scenic backgrounds. Expressive sculpts and ornate costumes adorn our fairytale heroines as all their dreams come true! Set of seven fully sculpted figurines Figurines include: Snow White, Cinderella, Aurora, Merida, Princess Jasmine, Pocahontas, and Mulan Presented in tiered window packaging with scenic background Pearlised accents Created for Disney Store Figurines: H10 x W6.5 x D6.5cm approx. Packaging: H28 x W28 x D10cm approx. Made from plastic
